code_change_under_test.summary: Add optional production-style attention sink handling to the HipKittens latent-dKV probe. The synthetic O/LSE precompute can include the zero-value attention sink, and the probe can time the separate vectorized dAttnSink row-term reduction used by the production Triton backend.
code_change_under_test.why: The HipKittens q16 C4-shaped slice emitted dQ/dOriKV/dCmpKV but not dSinks. Production Triton keeps dSinks as a separate reduction because fusing atomics into the query-major kernel perturbs the fast path. This gate checks whether accounting for dSinks changes the HipKittens latency story.

shape.timed_boundary: HipKittens D128 latent epilogue fork plus separate vectorized dAttnSink; O/L/delta precomputed outside kernel timing

build.command_shape: make -B hk_sharedkv_bwd_latent_epilogue GPU_TARGET=CDNA4 ATTN_B=4 ATTN_N=4096 ATTN_Q_N=4096 ATTN_KV_N=1024 ATTN_H=64 ATTN_H_KV=1 ATTN_QUERY_CHUNKS=16 ATTN_ROUTE_MASK_MODE=0 ATTN_NUM_WARPS=4

read.positive: Accounting for the production-style dSinks branch does not invalidate the HipKittens C4-shaped q16 slice. The dAttnSink reduction is sub-ms at this D128 synthetic shape, and all outputs are finite.
read.negative: This is still not a full SharedKV promotion. The kernel remains D128, routes whole compressed KV tiles, lacks exact per-token LI selected membership, and is not integrated into TorchTitan.
read.decision: Keep the HipKittens branch alive; dSinks is not the immediate blocker. The next gate should spend effort on full D512 score/row-term accumulation and real LI route membership.
read.e2e_tflops: Not measured, because this is not yet a better full SharedKV latency candidate. Per the experiment rule, e2e TFLOPs should be measured only after a full source-boundary kernel beats the Triton C4 gate.
